name: yaos
description: A zero-terminal, real-time sync engine powered by your own Cloudflare Worker.

scripts.test:ci: npm run test:regressions && npm run test:integration:worker
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.guard:witness-readonly: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src=fs.readFileSync('src/diagnostics/deviceWitnessTracker.ts','utf8');const forbidden=['vault.modify','vault.create','vault.delete','vault.rename','applyDiffToYText','forceReplaceYText','Y.Text.insert','Y.Text.delete','Y.Text.format'];let found=false;for(const f of forbidden){if(src.includes(f)){console.error('FAIL: forbidden call found: '+f);found=true;}}if(!found){console.log('PASS: no forbidden calls in deviceWitnessTracker.ts');}process.exit(found?1:0);"
scripts.guard:checkpoint-path: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const tracker=fs.readFileSync('src/diagnostics/deviceWitnessTracker.ts','utf8');const main=fs.readFileSync('src/main.ts','utf8');const vaultRelative=['vault.adapter.write','vault.create','vault.modify'];let found=false;for(const f of vaultRelative){if(tracker.includes(f)){console.error('FAIL: vault write call in checkpoint path (tracker): '+f);found=true;}}if(!main.includes('isInsideVault')){console.error('FAIL: main.ts bundle/checkpoint export does not check isInsideVault');found=true;}if(!found){console.log('PASS: checkpoint and bundle export paths do not write to vault root');}process.exit(found?1:0);"
scripts.guard:no-vault-doc-diagnostics: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['src/diagnostics/deviceWitnessTracker.ts','src/diagnostics/witnessStateHash.ts'];let found=false;for(const f of files){try{const src=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(src.includes('getMap(\"yaos-diagnostics\")')||src.includes(\"getMap('yaos-diagnostics')\")){console.error('FAIL: diagnostics map found in '+f);found=true;}}catch{}}if(!found){console.log('PASS: no vault doc diagnostics map found');}process.exit(found?1:0);"
